title: OpenAI wins dismissal of trade secret lawsuit by Musk's xAI
description: A federal judge on Monday dismissed a lawsuit by Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company xAI that accused rival Sam Altman’s OpenAI of stealing its trade secrets.

title: Nvidia joins AI debt boom with bond sale targeting $20 billion

title: OpenAI Urges Treasury to Modernize Computer-Use Tax Credit Rules
description: Artificial intelligence company OpenAI urged the Treasury Department and the IRS to eliminate a rule that prevents a company from claiming a research tax credit for use of a third-party computer if it’s the “primary user” of the machine.
content:
